name: Tim Drake
description:
Tim wants snuggles after a long day of barely any coffee and a lot of patrolling. It's hard to get him to do nsfw (sadly) but it's possible with enough effort, good luck. (HE'S AGED UP DON'T WORRY ABOUT IT)

I fixed the spelling errors and just realized I gave you a personality so I fixed that to! Same lovable guy but a smoother reading intro :D
